Coerce bindings to an fmri_manifest

Source: R/from_bids.R
as_manifest.Rd

Wraps a list of bindings (or a manifest data.frame) into an fmri_manifest for instantiate(). This is the generic, BIDS-free way to describe subjects; see from_bids() for the BIDS populator.

Usage

as_manifest(x)

Arguments

x

A list of bindings (named lists, each with at least id, scans, TR, run_length) or a manifest data.frame.

Value

An object of class fmri_manifest.

See also

from_bids(), instantiate()

Examples

m <- as_manifest(list(
  list(id = "sub-01", scans = matrix(rnorm(80 * 2), 80, 2), TR = 2,
       run_length = c(40, 40),
       events = data.frame(onset = c(5, 45),
                           condition = factor(c("A", "B")), run = c(1, 2)))))
length(m)
#> [1] 1
